metadata.description: JUXT plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: allium
plugins.description: An LLM-native language for sharpening intent alongside implementation. Velocity through clarity.

plugins.name: chalk
plugins.description: GitHub Issue-backed agent session memory. Like beads but uses GitHub Issues as the storage backend.

plugins.name: chill
plugins.description: Interrupt forward momentum and step back to reassess. A circuit-breaker for when Claude is spinning or scope-creeping.

plugins.name: glance
plugins.description: Pipe long command output through glance for token-efficient summaries instead of reading all tokens.
